description: Run all 7 metadata extractions in a single DWG open/close pass. Outputs a combined result.json keyed by operationId: drawingStatistics, symbolTableInventory, layoutData, projectCustomProperties, drawingHistory, layerTable, xrefList.

resultJson.description: Combined extraction result. Top-level keys: drawingStatistics, symbolTableInventory, layoutData, projectCustomProperties, drawingHistory, layerTable, xrefList.
